title: Add OSCORE is_protected check, ctx lookup, and coap_oscore_unprotect_request to msg_inbox_post
description: If CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE and request is OSCORE protected, lookup ctx by peer EUI64, unprotect to get original payload and code. Fail closed with UNAUTHORIZED or BAD_REQUEST. Update payload handling accordingly. See deaddrop_post pattern and coap_oscore.h.
close_reason: Implemented OSCORE is_protected check, peer EUI64 extraction, ctx lookup via oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64, coap_oscore_unprotect_request with orig_code validation, fail-closed UNAUTHORIZED/BAD_REQUEST/NOT_ALLOWED in msg_inbox_post (lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_server.c:312). Payload handling updated per deaddrop_post pattern. Added required include. Commit cd6b1dcc5. Tests via coap_keys/oscore native_sim verified indirectly.
